name: eval_lorebook_capture
notes: Lorebook drop detection (known failure mode): durable world lore stated in play should surface as a lorebook entry, not vanish.

locations.name: The Sunken Vault
locations.description: a drowned ruin beyond the breakwater

transcript: Old Senna leans in and tells me the Sunken Vault only opens at the lowest tide of the month, and that iron rusts instantly inside it.
